title: Fragmented Knowledge to Usable Intelligence
summary: Business value of turning scattered enterprise knowledge into permission-aware, source-grounded, reusable intelligence.
claims: Enterprise knowledge is often present but operationally unusable because it is fragmented, inaccessible, outdated, or untrusted.
Joz can design RAG and context systems that preserve source, permissions, provenance, and relevance.
The value comes from faster answers, better reuse, fewer repeated questions, and stronger decision consistency.
proof_points: Applied skills in RAG, embeddings, vector search, knowledge graphs, context engineering, memory, ACL-aware access, and verification.
Enterprise product experience across complex organisations and regulated environments.
